name: retrieval-literature-semantic-scholar
description: Runs Semantic Scholar Graph API search/query/fetch through Omiga local subprocess routing.

resources.label: Semantic Scholar
resources.description: Paper search and detail metadata via the Semantic Scholar Graph API.
riskNotes: Read-only Semantic Scholar Graph API; optional API key is projected as x-api-key only when configured.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum Semantic Scholar papers to request.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Optional comma-separated Semantic Scholar fields override.

interface.shortDescription: Semantic Scholar as a local retrieval plugin
interface.longDescription: Runs Semantic Scholar Graph API search/query/fetch through Omiga local subprocess routing.
defaultPrompt: Search Semantic Scholar for CRISPR single-cell papers.
Fetch a Semantic Scholar paper ID.
